task_description: Add DynamoDB table for storing audio pipeline metadata and extend Step Functions state machine with basic input/output handling (PutItem on trigger, UpdateItem on completion/failure). Follow strict TDD. Update ARCHITECTURE.md.

verification.summary: All 24 tests pass (15 existing + 8 DynamoDB/state machine tests + 1 state ordering test). Build completes with 0 errors/warnings. CDK synth produces valid CloudFormation. Review fixes applied: AddCatch on UpdateStatusCompleted and new state ordering test.
